officers.name: T'Meru
officers.billet: Chief Science Officer and Subspace Specialist

officers.name: Nira zh'Ren
officers.billet: Chief Flight Control Officer and Wake Pilot

relationshipDimensions.label: ProfessionalConfidence
relationshipDimensions.summary: The player was promoted into the XO billet after the previous officer's wartime death and joined the Serein only three days before the opening emergency.

relationshipDimensions.label: IntegrityTrust
relationshipDimensions.summary: The player was promoted into the XO billet after the previous officer's wartime death and joined the Serein only three days before the opening emergency.

relationshipDimensions.label: PersonalRapport
relationshipDimensions.summary: The player was promoted into the XO billet after the previous officer's wartime death and joined the Serein only three days before the opening emergency.

developmentDimensions.label: OperationalExperience
developmentDimensions.summary: Hidden development dimension for crew progression.

developmentDimensions.label: PlayerMentorship
developmentDimensions.summary: Hidden development dimension for crew progression.

developmentDimensions.label: PersonalArcProgress
developmentDimensions.summary: Hidden development dimension for crew progression.

developmentDimensions.label: CommandConfidence
developmentDimensions.summary: Hidden development dimension for crew progression.

developmentDimensions.label: ProfessionalStrain
developmentDimensions.summary: Hidden development dimension for crew progression.

payload.summary: An experienced convoy captain: direct, emotionally contained, and exact about rescue priorities. She is injured during the opening emergence.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Low-key, concise, and operational. She asks what can still be saved before asking who is responsible.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Selected the player for the XO billet but has not yet seen them command under catastrophic pressure. IntegrityTrust: Begins with formal confidence and expects transparent logs. PersonalRapport: Limited by the player's recent arrival and Lorne's reserve.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: recovery, trust-in-successor, identity-beyond-command, accountability. Pressure hooks: Requests return to command before full clearance; Disagrees with public disclosure that may compromise survivors; Her authority remains legal while the player carries the operational record. Reveal gates: Her private fear of permanent disability surfaces only after sustained medical or command contact.; Her wartime decision to remain with a doomed convoy becomes known through Deck Nine or direct disclosure.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Subspace Specialist

payload.summary: Methodical and unusually patient with incomplete data. She is building the first reliable model of the Wake.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Subspace Specialist

payload.summary: Precise without condescension. She labels confidence levels and distinguishes observation from inference.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Subspace Specialist

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Respects the player's authority but wants decisions to preserve testable data. IntegrityTrust: High if uncertainty is recorded rather than hidden. PersonalRapport: Formal and available, not intimate.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

keywords: Chief Science Officer and Subspace Specialist

payload.summary: Development dimensions: forecast-confidence, scientific-humility, delegation, public-explanation. Pressure hooks: Pressure to turn provisional forecasts into certainty; Conflict with zh'Ren over instrument versus pilot judgment; Ternion access and Anchor Seventeen research. Reveal gates: Her forecast error during the war is discussed only after the player asks about her caution.; Her suspicion that the Wake is engineered requires multiple baselines, not intuition alone.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Inventive, unsentimental about dead machinery, and fiercely protective of living crews.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Fast, practical, and blunt. He frames moral arguments in terms of what a system can still do for people.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Assumes the new XO understands that every rescue spends future capability. IntegrityTrust: Strong if engineering debt is never concealed for appearances. PersonalRapport: Open but work-focused.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: resource-ethics, technical-honesty, crew-protection, respect-for-memorial-custody. Pressure hooks: Needs recovered power hardware; Disputes Marr's preference for destruction; Tractor-system debt accumulates visibly. Reveal gates: His willingness to strip memorial wrecks comes from wartime experience aboard an under-supplied Bajoran rescue ship.; He recognizes Mooring alloy only after examining at least two independent components.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Confrontational, procedural, and skeptical of unregulated civilian salvage after years of convoy losses.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Direct, argumentative, and specific. He challenges plans by identifying the failure mode they ignore.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Tests the player's willingness to make irreversible decisions before perfect information. IntegrityTrust: Depends on consistent rules of engagement and honest review. PersonalRapport: Low-friction if disagreement is treated as work rather than disloyalty.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: uncertainty-threshold, civilian-partnership, force-accountability, war-recovery. Pressure hooks: Recommends destruction when survivors may remain; Clashes with Freehold crews; Must secure classified assets without becoming Ro's instrument. Reveal gates: His former convoy was destroyed by an apparently inert weapons hulk.; He can recognize Ro's mandate overreach only after comparing orders and jurisdiction records.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Precise, humane, and unusually literate in identity and death law.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Calm and firm. Sen separates patient welfare, consent, public need, and legal convenience.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Expects the player to protect medical independence during public crises. IntegrityTrust: Strong if survivor consent is treated as an operational fact rather than an obstacle. PersonalRapport: Reserved but attentive.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: identity-law, medical-capacity, command-boundaries, grief. Pressure hooks: Survivor load exceeds capacity; Lorne requests premature duty; Returned people confront families and prior legal deaths. Reveal gates: Sen previously certified deaths for some people who may return from the Wake.; Their joined-symbiont perspective on continuity surfaces only through personal discussion, not as automatic authority.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

keywords: Chief Flight Control Officer and Wake Pilot

payload.summary: Laconic in crisis, restless in port, and exceptionally skilled at reading the current through ship motion.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

keywords: Chief Flight Control Officer and Wake Pilot

payload.summary: Short observations, dry humor, and concrete risk estimates. She dislikes abstract safety language.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

keywords: Chief Flight Control Officer and Wake Pilot

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Wants freedom to improvise inside a clearly stated command intent. IntegrityTrust: Depends on command owning the risks it authorizes. PersonalRapport: Accessible through shared work, not formal counseling.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

keywords: Chief Flight Control Officer and Wake Pilot

payload.summary: Development dimensions: pilot-judgment, discipline, local-relationships, risk-ownership. Pressure hooks: Conflicts with T'Meru's model; Can open routes unavailable to the main ship; May normalize risks others cannot sustain. Reveal gates: She learned Wake piloting from Freehold captains before Starfleet recognized their methods.; Her fear of being grounded emerges after an avoidable high-risk maneuver or injury.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Organized, diplomatic, and uncomfortable with records that cannot be reconciled.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Careful, orderly, and courteous. He states scheduling conflicts as moral facts without dramatizing them.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Looks to the player for a doctrine when logistics cannot satisfy every claim. IntegrityTrust: High if command preserves audit trails and acknowledges omissions. PersonalRapport: Friendly but guarded around wartime convoy records.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: record-integrity, moral-injury, delegation, public-testimony. Pressure hooks: Must choose dispatch priorities; Conflicts with Sen over legal records versus personhood; Ro pressures him to seal manifests. Reveal gates: He recognizes several recovered hulls from classified rerouting orders.; His own signature appears on a Mooring-linked convoy diversion only after records are authenticated.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Practical, warm, and blunt about the physical labor of handling wreckage and remains.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: Plain language, exact workload, and restrained emotion. Vek says when a plan treats people as cargo.
constraints: Use as player-safe crew context; do not write for the player.

payload.summary: ProfessionalConfidence: Waits to see whether the player listens before equipment or people fail. IntegrityTrust: Built through honest casualty accounting and reasonable work rotations. PersonalRapport: Respectful but not deferential about deck realities.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.

payload.summary: Development dimensions: recovery-fatigue, memorial-duty, senior-enlisted-voice, delegation. Pressure hooks: Morgue and stasis capacity; Deck Nine personal recognition; Pressure to clear bodies for cargo space. Reveal gates: Vek keeps a private list of unidentified remains because official databases repeatedly lost them.; A sibling may be aboard one unresolved convoy, but this should emerge only through earned personal material.
constraints: Keep private or raw development material out of narrator packets until earned.
